metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace

properties.displayName: Entra ID - Member added to privileged directory role
properties.description: A user was added to an Entra directory role. Review every hit; privileged role changes should be rare and expected. Consider filtering to high-value roles (Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, etc.).
properties.query: AuditLogs | where OperationName has 'Add member to role' | extend Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Target=tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Role=tostring(TargetResources[0].modifiedProperties[1].newValue) | project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Actor, Target, Role
